evals.prompt: My Cordova app uses phonegap-plugin-barcodescanner for scanning. I want to replace it with Scandit BarcodeCapture. Here is my scanner file: PhonegapScannerApp.js
evals.expected_output: Removes the cordova.plugins.barcodeScanner.scan call and its options, adds a continuous BarcodeCapture integration with matching symbologies (EAN13UPCA, Code128, QR), preserves the scannedItems array, the deduplication check, and the renderItems summary. Shows a setup checklist.

assertions.text: cordova.plugins.barcodeScanner.scan( is NOT called in the new code (may appear in a before/after summary table)
The phonegap result.cancelled / result.text / result.format object shape is NOT used in the new code (may appear in a summary)
document.addEventListener('deviceready' is used as the init gate
Scandit.DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (v8 API used)
Scandit.DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is NOT present
new Scandit.BarcodeCapture( is present (v8 constructor used)
Scandit.BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present
context.setMode( or context.addMode( is called to register the mode
barcodeCapture.addListener( registers a listener with a didScan callback
session.newlyRecognizedBarcode is read inside didScan
Scandit.Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (mapped from the EAN_13 / UPC_A formats)
Scandit.Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from the CODE_128 format)
Scandit.Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from the QR_CODE format)
Scandit.Symbology.QR_CODE does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value (the QR_CODE phonegap format string in a summary table is acceptable)
Scandit.DataCaptureView.forContext( is present
view.connectToElement( is called to mount the preview to a DOM element
new Scandit.BarcodeCaptureOverlay( is present
view.addOverlay( is called
camera.switchToDesiredState(Scandit.FrameSourceState.On) is called to start the camera
The Scandit.* global is used (no 'import ... from scandit-cordova-datacapture-*' statements in runtime code)
The scannedItems array is preserved in the output
The deduplication check (ignoring a code whose text/data was already scanned) is preserved (semantic)
The renderItems summary function is preserved and called after each accepted scan
A summary of changes is shown listing what was removed (phonegap-plugin-barcodescanner) and what was added (Scandit BarcodeCapture)
Setup checklist mentions cordova plugin add scandit-cordova-datacapture-core and scandit-cordova-datacapture-barcode
Setup checklist mentions removing the old plugin (cordova plugin remove phonegap-plugin-barcodescanner)
Setup checklist mentions cordova prepare after the plugin changes
Setup checklist mentions a sized DOM element (e.g. <div id="data-capture-view">) is required for the camera preview
